null_results: The Sentient-Consciousness Projection Network (SCPN) is not empirical validation evidence
source_formulae: P0R02051: The framework proposes that this architecture is the Sentient-Consciousness Projection Network (SCPN). The SCPN is a hierarchical model
P0R02052: comprising 15 distinct but interconnected layers. It describes the "projection" of consciousness from a universal source down through cosmic,

P0R02053: planetary, and collective scales into the biological and quantum substrates of an individual being. Crucially, it also describes the feedback loops through which the experiences and actions of the
P0R02054: individual propagate back up the chain,
P0R02056: The SCPN is the central organising principle.
P0R02057: It provides a coherent structure for understanding how phenomena as diverse as quantum error correction (QEC), neuro-immune interfaces,
P0R02058: Chiral-Induced Spin Selectivity (CISS) in DNA,
P0R02059: cultural memetics, and cosmological evolution are all interconnected aspects of a single,
test_protocols: preserve The Sentient-Consciousness Projection Network (SCPN) source-accounting boundary
